label: Crushed @ Yankee Stadium
blurb: 117 mph at the perfect angle in the Bronx.

label: Wall ball @ Fenway
blurb: Bos slug into the Monster — bomb everywhere else.

label: Oppo cut @ Dodger Stadium
blurb: Lefty pulls a fastball with backspin.

label: Coors air @ Denver
blurb: 98 mph at 35° in thin air — the park does the rest.

label: Triples Alley @ Oracle
blurb: A bomb anywhere else; here it's a long out.

label: Pull-side @ Milwaukee
blurb: Short porch in right — friendly to lefty pull power.

label: Line drive @ Truist
blurb: Low launch angle — sneaks past the infield, dies short of the wall.

label: Wrigley wind @ Chicago
blurb: 92 mph at 38° — the model can't see today's wind, but the launch profile is HR-shaped.

label: T-Mobile fly @ Seattle
blurb: Wide, marine-air park; a 102 mph fly often dies.

label: Hard grounder @ Busch
blurb: 110 mph at -5° — nuke, but on the ground. Should not be an HR.
